Software developer 或software engineer
係資訊科技界食物鏈中高層
地位僅次於manager和boss
負責設計和管理
月入50k up
一般要有好多年經驗
佢地會話自己識乜：我識 uml, agile, waterfall, DevOps, ITIL, project management, sraa, business analysis, software testing
讀過cissp, pmp, prince2
